package service

import (
	"context"
	"golang.org/x/sync/errgroup"
	"sync"
)

type Cache struct {
	mu     sync.Mutex
	values []string
}

func (c *Cache) StoreAll(ctx context.Context, items []string) error {
	var group errgroup.Group
	for _, item := range items {
		item := item
		group.Go(func() error {
			return persist(ctx, item)
		})
	}
	c.mu.Lock()
	c.values = append(c.values, "done")
	c.mu.Unlock()
	return group.Wait()
}

func persist(ctx context.Context, v string) error {
	_ = ctx
	_ = v
	return nil
}
